24535576.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
24535576.transcript: Man of Conviction. I can follow that.

26808961.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
26808961.transcript: All that, and you pretend to be a jester.

30239351.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
30239351.transcript: You fools don't stand a chance.

44350648.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
44350648.transcript: Don't do this. It's not too late.

46617930.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
46617930.transcript: You sure you want to buddy up to me?

51664682.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_4
51664682.transcript: Alright, let's get back to it.

71260400.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
71260400.transcript: Go for their legs. It's their weak point.

72655321.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
72655321.transcript: Huh. You kept up with me.

76889502.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
76889502.transcript: Not a bad showing, was it?

116693682.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
116693682.transcript: Why, you still want to rumble? Fine by me.

122893659.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
122893659.transcript: On to the next. You coming?

137899880.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
137899880.transcript: It doesn't have to be this way.

153290786.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
153290786.transcript: We'll blast through whatever crosses us.

159916354.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
159916354.transcript: You've got power behind those punches.

167641818.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
167641818.transcript: You have me as long as you need me.

180024002.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
180024002.transcript: You haven't lost a step, Maggie.

214984657.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
214984657.transcript: This is a waste of time.

218286202.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
218286202.transcript: It can't handle our combined force!

220364886.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
220364886.transcript: That one was fine, but don't get a big head.

222671710.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
222671710.transcript: Do you ever tone it down?

229960668.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
229960668.transcript: We can take it from here.

238693448.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
238693448.transcript: Nice hit! Now serve up another!

256994182.label: PL1900_vo_ETC_comeback_1
256994182.transcript: I swear I will end them.

293807442.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
293807442.transcript: I see through your pattern now.

300009347.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
300009347.transcript: Keep your head in the game.

304748479.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
304748479.transcript: I remember this darkness. It will never take me again.

311848344.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
311848344.transcript: When your life is battle, you have to stay in fighting shape.

346442775.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
346442775.transcript: Save the praise until I've proven my worth.

352825193.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
352825193.transcript: Get ready for the next one.

375810190.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
375810190.transcript: You're not bad with those dual blades.

379178632.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
379178632.transcript: Sorry, but there was no other way.

411640769.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C
411640769.transcript: Not what I had in mind.

433984002.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
433984002.transcript: You've let the dragon take control.

458018711.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
458018711.transcript: Or what? You'll nip at their heels?

458531666.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
458531666.transcript: Nice feint. Where do you learn to fight?

464265784.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
464265784.transcript: You really love those pets, huh?

484273324.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
484273324.transcript: We have to break Angra before it opens the gate.

497037350.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
497037350.transcript: You can pick your jaw up off the ground.

497276631.label: PL1900_vo_MOV_wait_cold_4
497276631.transcript: Eh, eh, eh, huh, huh, hmm.

514210062.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
514210062.transcript: Come on, Galanza. I'd pack it up if I were you.

519220258.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
519220258.transcript: You should know better than to fight me.

522239153.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
522239153.transcript: You can control that fire, right?

538291833.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
538291833.transcript: I won't turn down a challenge.

554213384.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
554213384.transcript: Now that it's on the right course, I agree.

557356819.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
557356819.transcript: I'll give my all for this crew.

558344582.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
558344582.transcript: I know what I must do.

583722026.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
583722026.transcript: What is the meaning of this?

591430777.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
591430777.transcript: Then I should learn from you.

604593649.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
604593649.transcript: Now I'm working with the undead.

627662219.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
627662219.transcript: Primeval God Furikun. At last we meet.

628422196.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
628422196.transcript: So, you're an astral war machine?

648713353.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
648713353.transcript: Mother, what do you hope to accomplish?

654999412.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
654999412.transcript: His power. This is why we stand as one.

675193961.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
675193961.transcript: We'll beat the next one even harder.

683478278.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
683478278.transcript: You don't have a prayer, Generals.

688404076.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
688404076.transcript: Your swordmancy isn't as perfect as you think.

708389239.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
708389239.transcript: Get ready for the next battle.

723438907.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
723438907.transcript: I'm going to break that spear.

724772942.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
724772942.transcript: Take it from me, you need to come back!

737336959.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
737336959.transcript: Already caught. Now lead the way.

750201598.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
750201598.transcript: I'm starting to get a feel for how your crew fights.

765497304.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
765497304.transcript: We will rid this Skydom of darkness.

772309241.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
772309241.transcript: I wield this sword to protect the innocent.

789628157.label: PL1900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
789628157.transcript: Good work. We won this day.

802938276.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
802938276.transcript: This chill seeps into the bones.

810278090.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
810278090.transcript: Take control of your own future, Id!

833586591.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
833586591.transcript: I could get used to this.

835719934.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
835719934.transcript: But I'd like to see him try.

838025644.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
838025644.transcript: Lay down your arms or forfeit your lives.

849600093.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
849600093.transcript: Right. Let's pick up the pace.

854813887.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
854813887.transcript: You'll see the error of your ways. Or else.

885031717.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
885031717.transcript: If I know you, then I know you won't give up.

892240245.label: PL1900_vo_ETC_lift_stay_line_2
892240245.transcript: Do I look like a pack mule?

892467190.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
892467190.transcript: Then I'll just have to be more brutal.

919648230.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
919648230.transcript: Fighting with this crew has its perks.

925822779.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
925822779.transcript: I'm done walking in the dark!

929970179.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
929970179.transcript: How did you... Did you already fall asleep?

970722985.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
970722985.transcript: Don't succumb to that damn dragon!

992739214.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
992739214.transcript: I'll take the Vanguard next time.

994057096.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
994057096.transcript: Don't feel sorry for these machines!

1010568871.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
1010568871.transcript: You don't have to tell me twice.

1027091748.label: PL1900_vo_ETC_comeback_2
1027091748.transcript: I've still got fight in me.

1032712378.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
1032712378.transcript: You've come too far to go back now.

1060028729.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
1060028729.transcript: We've made it. You know what to do.

15898131.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
15898131.transcript: Never seen someone wield a sword like that.

52531345.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
52531345.transcript: Thanks, but I can do better.

60739057.label: PL1900_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL2400_2
60739057.transcript: So that's how you do it.

63971640.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2500_2
63971640.transcript: Glad you're here to catch me.

73514725.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
73514725.transcript: There's more power in me. I can feel it.

81413396.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
81413396.transcript: Can't believe you made that shot. Damn.

81611130.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
81611130.transcript: Doesn't mean I've finished my penance yet.

121782726.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
121782726.transcript: What? I'm not sure what you're getting at.

162210583.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
162210583.transcript: In that case, let's move to the main course.

163436609.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
163436609.transcript: Were you trying to get yourself killed?

166553327.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
166553327.transcript: Then we sing their last rites.

179308276.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL2400_3
179308276.transcript: Didn't think it was possible to bring you down.

180249419.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
180249419.transcript: Couldn't have done it without everyone's help.

181639985.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
181639985.transcript: Couldn't have done it without you.

212389929.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_recovery_B_PL2500
212389929.transcript: You're always looking out for me.

247439403.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL2400_2
247439403.transcript: Would it kill you to slow down?

289282750.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_buff_A_PL2400
289282750.transcript: Not such a lone wolf after all.

364962010.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
364962010.transcript: Thanks, Siegfried. You've been a big help.

377789950.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
377789950.transcript: I had to, if I'm to protect this crew.

378748931.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
378748931.transcript: First of all, it's not a lizard. And you know it.

397402723.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
397402723.transcript: How can I atone for all my sins?

442748169.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
442748169.transcript: The magic of a smile, huh?

458164598.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0100
458164598.transcript: Some things can't be done alone.

474189313.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
474189313.transcript: Eternal Rage style, huh? It's a big world out there.

487360733.label: PL1900_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2500_3
487360733.transcript: This battle's not gonna be easy.

511530750.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
511530750.transcript: Liria is fortunate to have found you as a protector.

519458592.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
519458592.transcript: I know. I'll figure it out.

545925428.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
545925428.transcript: They'll help me protect these guys.

656606432.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
656606432.transcript: I'll take your word for it.

656831251.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
656831251.transcript: Your power, it's like my own.

670112070.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
670112070.transcript: It was Galanza's idea. Doubles the firepower, he said.

693463192.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
693463192.transcript: We are living proof of the potential in these skies.

723126321.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
723126321.transcript: Guess all that training together paid off.

756250110.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
756250110.transcript: What do I know of justice?

784792137.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL2500_3
784792137.transcript: Alright, let's get back to it.

820798613.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
820798613.transcript: Sure, but we're not out of the woods yet.

849538797.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
849538797.transcript: I've got first dibs on the next fall.

980710173.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
980710173.transcript: Your flames are on another level.

992199669.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
992199669.transcript: Your spearwork's different from Galanza's, but just as deadly.

1000511188.label: PL1900_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL2400_3
1000511188.transcript: Alright, let's get back to it.

1026802923.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
1026802923.transcript: You really like driving yourself into a corner, huh?

1048094514.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
1048094514.transcript: So your burden, it's the Devil's Flame?

15110716.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
15110716.transcript: Nice. You got my back for the next one.

227060498.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_abs_2
227060498.transcript: Can't afford to be lazy. One set down.

236110802.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
236110802.transcript: No one gets in my way.

246169805.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
246169805.transcript: Let's do this. One... Two... Three... Four... Five... Six...

387701577.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
387701577.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

969529006.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
969529006.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

989745129.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
989745129.transcript: There's more where that came from.

1010629060.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
1010629060.transcript: I'll use this power to protect the skies!

93803058.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
93803058.transcript: I've honed it. Perfected it to protect this crew.

683346053.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
683346053.transcript: Lose your focus. Lose the battle.

864514774.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
864514774.transcript: Hmph. That's some power you got there.

891256933.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_shout_3
891256933.transcript: All together, Zoya! What's a Zoya?

352972066.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
352972066.transcript: Time for some grubba. Not bad.

619696997.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
619696997.transcript: I could eat. Plain, but sufficient.

1008985848.label: PL1900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
1008985848.transcript: Better eat while we can. Let's move.
